name: socratic-kernel
description: A local-first cognitive autonomy practice application with privacy-safe judgment artifacts, a guided multi-provider model center, and an optional Socratic AI gateway.

scripts.test: node --check app.js && node --check onboarding.js && node --check ai.js && node --check visual.js && node --check interactions.js && node --check results.js && node --check sw.js && node --check lib/ai-gateway.js && node --check lib/http.js && node --check api/providers.js && node --check api/inquiry.js && node tests/smoke.mjs && node tests/motion.mjs && node tests/model-center.mjs && node tests/results.mjs && node tests/ai-gateway.mjs
